languages.text: "Нет. Но буду, {name}. Вы могли оставить меня там, но предпочли отговорить старика. Несмотря ни на что. У вас сердце истинного Вольного Торговца — смелое, жаждущее, справедливое. Я... ошибался в вас. Но ныне горжусь. Вы достойны венца династии, наследн{mf|ик|ца}".

"No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."
languages.original_text: "Нет. Но буду, {name}. Вы могли оставить меня там, но предпочли отговорить старика. Несмотря ни на что. У вас сердце истинного Вольного Торговца — смелое, жаждущее, справедливое. Я... ошибался в вас. Но ныне горжусь. Вы достойны венца династии, наследн{mf|ик|ца}".

You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

"No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

"No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

languages.text: 「いいえ。でも、私はそうなるでしょう、{名前}。あなたは私を置いていくこともできたのに、老人の心を動かそうと決めた。どんな困難があっても。あなたは真のローグトレーダーの心を持っている。大胆で、貪欲で、そして過度に公平だ。私はあなたを誤解していた。でも、今は誇りに思う。あなたは王冠に値する相続人だ」
languages.original_text: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ。でも、私はそうなるでしょう、{名前}。あなたは私を置いていくこともできたのに、老人の心を動かそうと決めた。どんな困難があっても。あなたは真のローグトレーダーの心を持っている。大胆で、貪欲で、そして過度に公平だ。私はあなたを誤解していた。でも、今は誇りに思う。あなたは王冠に値する相続人だ。」

languages.text: «No, {name}, pero lo estaré. Podrías haberme abandonado allí, pero elegiste convencer a un anciano contra todo pronóstico. Tienes alma de Comerciante Independiente... un alma audaz, hambrienta y ecuánime como ninguna. Te... había juzgado mal. Estoy orgulloso de ti. La dinastía está en buenas manos contigo».
languages.original_text: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

traits.locale_text: «No, {name}, pero lo estaré. Podrías haberme abandonado allí, pero elegiste convencer a un anciano contra todo pronóstico. Tienes alma de Comerciante Independiente... un alma audaz, hambrienta y ecuánime como ninguna. Te... había juzgado mal. Estoy orgulloso de ti. La dinastía está en buenas manos contigo».

languages.text: "Nein. Aber bald werde ich es sein, {name}. Ihr hättet mich dort zurücklassen können, habt Euch aber entschlossen, einen alten Mann zu beschwatzen. Allen Widrigkeiten zum Trotz. Ihr habt das Herz {mf|eines wahren Freihändlers|einer wahren Freihändlerin} ... mutig, hungrig, gerecht. Ich ... habe Euch falsch eingeschätzt. Aber jetzt bin ich stolz auf Euch. Ihr seid {mf|ein würdiger Erbe|eine würdige Erbin} der Krone der Dynastie."
languages.original_text: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

traits.locale_text: "Nein. Aber bald werde ich es sein, {name}. Ihr hättet mich dort zurücklassen können, habt Euch aber entschlossen, einen alten Mann zu beschwatzen. Allen Widrigkeiten zum Trotz. Ihr habt das Herz {mf|eines wahren Freihändlers|einer wahren Freihändlerin} ... mutig, hungrig, gerecht. Ich ... habe Euch falsch eingeschätzt. Aber jetzt bin ich stolz auf Euch. Ihr seid {mf|ein würdiger Erbe|eine würdige Erbin} der Krone der Dynastie."

languages.text: « Non. Mais ma situation s'améliorera, {name}. Vous auriez pu me laisser là-bas, mais vous avez réussi à me faire entendre raison. Contre toute attente... Vous avez le tempérament des plus grands libres-marchands : vous possédez un sens aigu de la justice et vous ne manquez ni de courage ni d'ambition. Je... je vous avais mal {mf|jugé|jugée}. Mais à présent, je suis fier de vous. Vous êtes {mf|le digne héritier|la digne héritière} de la couronne de la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

traits.locale_text: « Non. Mais ma situation s'améliorera, {name}. Vous auriez pu me laisser là-bas, mais vous avez réussi à me faire entendre raison. Contre toute attente... Vous avez le tempérament des plus grands libres-marchands : vous possédez un sens aigu de la justice et vous ne manquez ni de courage ni d'ambition. Je... je vous avais mal {mf|jugé|jugée}. Mais à présent, je suis fier de vous. Vous êtes {mf|le digne héritier|la digne héritière} de la couronne de la dynastie. »

languages.text: “不好，但我会好起来的，{name}。你本可以把我留在那里，但你逆势而为，选择说服一个老家伙回心转意，而且成功了。你拥有真正行商浪人的心性——勇敢、进取、公正到近乎固执。我……低估了你。现在，我以你为荣。你是配得上王朝桂冠的继承人。”
languages.original_text: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."

traits.locale_text: “不好，但我会好起来的，{name}。你本可以把我留在那里，但你逆势而为，选择说服一个老家伙回心转意，而且成功了。你拥有真正行商浪人的心性——勇敢、进取、公正到近乎固执。我……低估了你。现在，我以你为荣。你是配得上王朝桂冠的继承人。”

languages.text: "Hayır. Fakat olacağım {name}. Ne de olsa beni orada bırakabilirdin ama sen bir ihtiyarı ikna etmeyi seçtin. Her şeye rağmen. Gerçek bir Hür Tacir'in yüreğine sahipsin... Cesur, açgözlü, fazlasıyla adil. Seni... Yanlış yargılamışım. Artık seninle gurur duyuyorum. Hanedanlığın tacına layık bir vârissin."
languages.original_text: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."
